name: MiroFish Multi-Agent Backtest Swarm
description: Orchestrates multi-agent research simulations using MiroFish cohorts and Ruflo coordination, checking dynamic HMM sizing and committing virtual results.

tools.name: run_swarm_backtest
tools.description: Trigger a complete 4-scenario simulation backtest for a target prediction contract.

asset.description: Target contract ticker, e.g. SOL, BTC, ETH.
